fault_hypothesis: On line 68, `int(x)` truncates each planned value toward zero, discarding fractional remainders without redistributing them, so the sum of allocations is less than `total` when shares don't divide evenly.

constraints.intent: After truncation, the sum of integer allocations must still equal total (fails when fractional parts are discarded without redistribution).

spec.expr: sum(allocations__1) == sum(int(x) for x in planned__1) and sum(allocations__1) == int(total)

constraints.intent: The truncated allocations list must sum to total, not to floor(total) minus lost remainders.
At the end of the integer-allocation branch, the sum of allocations must equal total.
The returned allocations must sum exactly to total.
